_doc: Rise time at V_LOW%-V_HIGH% of the auto-detected envelope (ymin..ymax) of the clipped waveform. Matches the 'I let Maestro figure out the rails' idiom; for explicit VSS/VDD rails see rise_time_fixed.
name: rise_time_auto
expression: average(riseTime(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END) ymin(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END)) nil ymax(clip(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") $T_START $T_END)) nil $V_LOW $V_HIGH t "time"))
